purpose: menqstudio/OS root canonical startup read order. Every new session (Claude or ChatGPT) reads these IN ORDER, IN FULL, before acting. GitHub is the single source of truth; a textual 'I read it' is not evidence. Mirrors the human-facing START_HERE.md / CLAUDE.md startup law in machine-readable form. (The engine/ half has its own engine/config/canonical-read-manifest.json with engine-relative paths — that is a separate track.)
notes: NEXT_CHAT.md §3 holds the exact current branch/PR/HEAD/3b-1A-GREEN-evidence/3b-1B-RED-findings/STOP-gates/next-action and must be updated in the same commit as any state change. PROJECT_STATE.md and TASKS.md are the live coordination board. The Wave 3b design chain is: WAVE_3B_ISOLATED_SIGNER_DESIGN.md (Architect-GREEN, the isolated-signer/manifest design) -> WAVE_3B1_EXECUTION_BINDING_MAP.md (3b-1 re-scope) -> WAVE_3B1B_EXECUTION_BINDING_ADDENDUM.md (3b-1B design-lock, currently design RED, NOT GREEN, no code). Do not add stale or nonexistent paths here.
